violations.text: At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application was printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

4 containers of sauces previously produced on site were observed held at 42 to 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sauces were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. (Setting for refrigeration unit was checked and set to colder temperature at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the areas of the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor below the 3 bay sink was observed to have an open space to the subfloor below. Floor is to be adjusted/repaired to close off the area to prevent possible pooling of water in the subfloor at times of mopping or possible spills/leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
